summary: The diff implements most of the required Privacy & Data Control features including the Settings page section, DeleteAccountModal with multi-step flow, SelectiveDataDeletionCard, DataExportCard, SecurityInfoCard, ComplianceCard, PolicyModal, and backend deleteAllUserData/logDeletionEvent methods. However, there are a few gaps and one notable deviation worth flagging.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-7 requires the SecurityInfoCard to explicitly list 'Firebase Security Rules enforcement' as one of the six named security features.
missing_requirements.reason: The SecurityInfoCard.tsx diff shows the third feature is labeled 'Security Rules Enforcement' rather than 'Firebase Security Rules enforcement'. The requirement and AC explicitly state 'Firebase Security Rules' must be listed by name.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-6 states export functions must be sourced from the existing dataExport.ts utility file.
missing_requirements.reason: DataExportCard.tsx defines its own inline export functions (exportAsJSON, exportAsCSV, exportAsPDF, triggerDownload) rather than importing from the existing dataExport.ts utility. The AC explicitly states 'Export functions are sourced from the existing dataExport.ts utility.'

hallucinated_features.description: A separate standalone Privacy page (Privacy.tsx) with its own privacy preferences toggles, data count summaries, analytics/AI toggle controls, and device clearing actions was implemented as a full page route (/privacy).
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks for a Privacy & Data Control section inside the Settings page. A separate Privacy page/route was not requested and adds UI surface not specified in any requirement.
